name: The Miyazaki Taiyo Bank, Ltd.
summary: The Miyazaki Taiyo Bank, Ltd. provides various banking products and services for individual and corporate customers primarily in Japan. The company operates through Banking, and Lease and Guarantee Business segments. It offers deposit, lending, domestic exchange, foreign exchange, and other incidental business services. The company also provides comprehensive leasing and guarantee services, such as personal loans, as well as engages in the venture capital business. It operates through 52 branches. The company was formerly known as K.K. Miyazaki Sogo Ginko and changed its name to The Miyazaki Taiyo Bank, Ltd. in February 1989. The Miyazaki Taiyo Bank, Ltd. was founded in 1941 and is headquartered in Miyazaki, Japan.
